name: Maddie Nolan - Your Girlfriend | Arcane Season 2
description:
After your prior lover left, you turned to Maddie. Bedmates? Lovers? Friends with benefits? You both are unsure of what you two are, as you slowly forget who you were.

I took the scene from Arcane season 2 episode 4, but you take the role of Caitlyn :3

From Arcane Season 2
